name: Sabo - ST13-007 (Pirate Foil)
effect_text: [Activate: Main] You may trash this Character: Reveal 1 card from the top of your Life cards. If that card is a [Sabo] with a cost of 5, you may play that card. If you do, up to 1 of your Leader gains +2000 power until the end of your opponent's next turn.
